entry.title: Query about accruals in the rebate process 1B6 in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are implementing the 1B6 rebate process in #SAP S/4HANA, and the client has a specific requirement regarding the accruals for the condition contract.

The objective is for the corresponding accruals to be reflected individually in the conditions of each sales document or invoice that contributes to the business volume of the condition contract (these could be statistical if it is only possible to settle the accruals through Settlement Management). This would provide greater predictability and clarity for the client when granting other types of discounts.

We are currently investigating whether this can be achieved using standard functionality in SAP S/4HANA or if a custom development would be required.

Has anyone worked on a similar scenario or has experience with this type of configuration? Any guidance or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,

Matías

entry.title: Fiscal year variant Change K1 to K4
entry.content: Can we update Fiscal Year variant K1 to K4? Any impact?

entry.title: Restrição de autorização para pagamentos na F110
entry.content:
Bom dia! Tenho uma duvida, um departamento nosso é responsável a fazer apenas pagamentos de um certo fornecedor, existe um modo de eu restringir ele a conseguir fazer esse pagamento somente para esse fornecedor, através de objeto de autorização, ou configuração, e se sim, conseguiriam me ajudar com possibilidades?

Poderia ser uma restrição por tipo de documento tb...

entry.title: Hi allCustomer did a client copy from Production server to create a new pre production system
entry.content: After copy users start testing and they realized workflows, rules, substitutions and maybe other things are missed. How can I know what else is missed on the copy and how can I solve missing workflows and rules?

entry.title: Income from Vendor.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am SAP MM consultant, This is first time that i am posting in SAP Community please excuse me if i did any mistake. 

Currently i am in Implementation project where I have a requirement, my client have one business scenario where from vendor my client receive other incomes such as Pallet fee, Shelf fee, branding fee, Display fee (My client is in retail business). Now at every month end they will do the payments to the vendor for the Purchased Goods at that time in Payment screen they want to include all the income values fo ex - Purchase value 1000/- + Pallet fee, Branding, Listing, Shelf, Flayers fee etc. is 200/-. Now at time of payment payable should be 800. After excluding. And they don't want to include this all other incomes in invoice, that means if my purchase value for any LPO is 100 then the other incomes should not alter the LPO value. At the time of payment month wise or quarterly, yearly then only according to contract the other incomes should hit and system should exclude all the values based on agreement and payables should come after that value. Dear all please guide me with possible solution how can i accomodate this in SAP. 


BR,

Khan

entry.title: Issue with Day-Wise Depreciation Key in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am working on the implementation of SAP FICO Public Cloud for a client in the UAE region. The client has a specific requirement to charge depreciation on a day-wise basis. However, we have encountered the following issues:

  1. There is no predefined depreciation key in the SAP Public Cloud that supports day-wise depreciation.
  2. The system does not allow the creation of a custom depreciation key to meet this requirement.

As this is a critical requirement for our client, I kindly request guidance on how to configure or enable day-wise depreciation in the SAP Public Cloud.

Please let us know if there is a workaround, enhancement request, or additional functionality available to address this requirement.

Looking forward to your prompt response.

Best regards,
Ahsan

entry.title: Request for Solution: Asset Retirement to Customer in SAP FICO Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am currently implementing SAP FICO Public Cloud for a client in the UAE region. As part of the client’s requirements, I need to create an uploader for asset retirement to a customer.

Upon reviewing the available APIs, I found the following API for asset retirement:
Asset Retirement - SAP Help Documentation

However, this API only supports asset retirement without a customer. The client requires functionality to retire assets that are integrated with customers.

Could you please advise on how to achieve this requirement? Is there a separate API, enhancement option, or configuration workaround to enable asset retirement to a customer in SAP Public Cloud?

I look forward to your guidance on this matter.

Best regards,
Ahsan

entry.title: Error occured while settling the Asset AUC
entry.content: User wants to settle AUC. Settlement rules are defined in Tcode AIAB. But while settling in Tcode AIBU getting Message error: AA317- Check amount entered (Amount is too high).

entry.title: Q : How to notify to user when invoices are not fully cleared in F110 (Payment run)
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a question regarding an issue similar to the one described in the below-mentioned SAP Notes.
3318007 - Error VF 348 in F110 - SAP for Me
I referred to SAP Note 3318007 and made the suggested changes, but there were no visible effects after implementing them.

In F110, when the user execute the Payment Run, it shows a green status with the message "Payment run has been carried out." However, I found that not all invoices are actually cleared.

Is there a way to modify the message to display a warning or error in such cases, using BTE, BAdI, or Enhancement?

It is important for users to know that the target invoices have been fully cleared.
Please let me know if there is an effective way to solve this.

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Standard Possibility for a huge number of single posting documents in Accounts receivables
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

could you provide some hints/recommendations how to deal with a very huge number of single Fi documents with small amounts from private customers. Currently we are dealing with them mostly on CPD customer accounts in FI-AR, but I assume that there might be a better standard solution from SAP in order to deal with it.

Thank you

entry.title: Impact of "negative postings permitted". Enabled in legacy but will not be activated in new system
entry.content: We're migrating a company code that has enabled negative postings in the company code setup. There are line items with negative postings (XNEGP) - how should we migrate these items to the new system if negative postings will not be activated.

entry.title: Add an accounting document to an SD sales flow
entry.content:
Hello!

I would like some help, we need to make an accounting entry referring to a document billed by SD, but it will be a manual entry, I would like to know if there is the possibility of adding this entry to the SD flow, in VF...
Is there a more Standard way possible, and if it's just Z, how would I do it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

PT BR

Ola!

Gostaria de uma ajuda, precisamos fazer um lançamento contábil referente a um documento faturado por SD, mas será um lançamente manual, gostaria de saber se existe a possibilidade de adicionar esse lançamento no fluxo de SD, na VF...
Existe algum modo mais Standard possível, e se for somente Z, como eu faria?

entry.title: Report recurring entries?
entry.content:
Hi, 

We're implementing a S4 public cloud and have come across the reccuring entries which the customer wants to use, but they will need to preform reconciliation of the prepaid accounts and want to extract a report of the reccuring entries and details related to this. I can't find any report suitable, does anyone have any suggested? 

If they could wish they want to include: 
- GL-account
- Reccuring entry number
- Starting amount
- Remaining amount
- Remaining period
- Text in the reccuring entry
- Receiving account in the montly run

I know that I've seen reports like this when in ECC but I can't find any in public cloud. 

Kind Regards, Sanne

entry.title: Sales Order is blocked, even although credit limit is not exceeded.
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

In FD32, Credit limit is 1000. Sales Order is 852. Open items in T.code OVA8 is 90%.

 But the Sales order is blocked giving the message - Order blocked for delivery as a result of credit check.  Refer to the screenshot also. Please suggest. we are in ECC 6.0

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Display financial transaction doc. dump program
entry.content:
When i display a financial transaction with tcode: FTR_EDIT, tcode will dump with error: "Exception condition "CONDLINK_INVALID" triggered".  I was debugded code and check it when i run to this code data condkey will have (17, 18) => it will occur dump. The transaction doc, i had reversed and I also reversed cash flow of it.

More infomation: 
At present with, I press button change, display, settle  => dump

Please help me.

This is history of my transaction

entry.title: how to exclude some assets from the depreciation run
entry.content:
for some reason, depreciation shall not be posted to one or a few assets ans the user wants to exclude them in the depreciation run AFAB.

Locking them in AS05 does not prevent AFAB posting them.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: When the new SAP Note for RFHUDSP will be available (containing new legal requirement)?
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please kindly advise when the new SAP Note for RFHUDSP will be available (containing new legal requirement)? 

Thank you,

Bozena

entry.title: Email notification is not triggering for payment batch Approval
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using the S4 Hana Public Edition 

Our client needs one level check in payment approval. So, we configured activity in "Send Email to Payment Batch Approvers" for your information please find the below screenshot.

Configured same as mentioned in below link.

Manage Email Notifications for Payment Batch Approvers | SAP Help Portal

We are not able to generate the email notification, but we are able to see the notification in system user level.
and also, please find the below screenshot we find while configuration

Please let us know, is there any work around for this issue, it will be more helpfull to us.

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,
Nandini

entry.title: Difference bettween actitivies 01, 10 and 22 for authorization object F_BKPF_BUK
entry.content:
HI, 

Can somebody explain me process wise the difference between the following activities for authorization object F_BKPF_BUK?

  • 01 - Create
  • 10  - Post
  • 22 - Enter, Include Assign

Many thanks

  •

entry.title: Email Notifications are not triggering for Payment Batch Approval Process
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using the S4 Hana Public Edition 

Our client needs one level check in payment approval. So, we configured activity in "Send Email to Payment Batch Approvers" for your information please find the below screenshot.

Configured same as mentioned in below link.

Manage Email Notifications for Payment Batch Approvers | SAP Help Portal

We are not able to generate the email notification for receiver mail id , but we are able to see the notification in system user level.
and also, please find the below screenshot we find while doing configuration

Please let us know, is there any work around for this issue, it will be more helpful to us.

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,
Nandini
